title: Hybrid Aquatic
description: Hybrid Aquatic is a mod that enhances your underwater Minecraft experience! Explore improved rivers, swamps, oceans, and undersea caves containing a variety of new creatures and blocks to liven up your world!

### What is Hybrid Aquatic?
Hybrid Aquatic is a mod that enhances your underwater Minecraft experience! Explore improved rivers, swamps, oceans, and undersea caves with new creatures, blocks, and biomes.

We're passionate about capturing the beauty and mystery of real-life marine ecosystems. Brace yourself for a world that balances stunning wonders with thrilling adventures in the oceans.

Hybrid Aquatic blends creativity and realism. Dive in, explore new horizons, and uncover the secrets of the deep blue. Get ready to make a splash and encounter wonders like never before in Minecraft's aquatic realms!
#
### Features
Hybrid Aquatic adds a large collection of marine creatures, including new fish, sharks, crustaceans, critters, otters, nautiluses, a new miniboss, and more!

The mod also adds a variety of items and blocks, such as diving armor, sea sponges, fishing hooks, crates, anemones, and new types of corals!
#
### Frequently Asked Questions

**Q**: Are you going to update to [Insert Version Here]?

**A**: Undecided, but hopefully so.

**Q**: Are you going to backport the mod to [Insert Version Here]?

**A**: Nothing prior to 1.20.1 will be getting backports.

**Q**: Is compatibility planned with [Insert Mod Here]?

**A**: Our mission includes adding compatibility for as many mods as possible.
